name: shikanime-studio/skills
description: A curated catalog of self-improved agent skills for Hermes and compatible agents.

skills.name: apple-notes
skills.description: Manage Apple Notes via memo CLI: create, search, edit.

skills.name: apple-reminders
skills.description: Apple Reminders via remindctl: add, list, complete.

skills.name: claude-code
skills.description: Delegate coding to Claude Code CLI (features, PRs).

skills.name: codex
skills.description: Delegate coding to OpenAI Codex CLI (features, PRs).

skills.name: kanban-worker
skills.description: Pitfalls, examples, and edge cases for Hermes Kanban workers.

skills.name: cpn-console-plugins
skills.description: Develop, debug, and fix plugins for the cloud-pi-native console.

skills.name: cpn-documentation
skills.description: Write and maintain cloud-pi-native/documentation (VitePress site).

skills.name: home-manager-pitfalls
skills.description: Home Manager module gotchas — silent failures, hidden dependencies.

skills.name: nix-module-bulk-edit
skills.description: Bulk-edit Nix module files using reliable patterns.

skills.name: dogfood
skills.description: Exploratory QA of web apps: find bugs, evidence, reports.

skills.name: ghstack-workflow
skills.description: Stacked PRs with ghstack + Jujutsu (jj). Create, update, land, and manage stacked pull requests.

skills.name: github-auth
skills.description: GitHub auth setup: HTTPS tokens, SSH keys, gh CLI login.

skills.name: github-code-review
skills.description: Review PRs: diffs, inline comments via gh or REST.

skills.name: github-issues
skills.description: Create, triage, label, assign GitHub issues via gh or REST.

skills.name: github-repo-management
skills.description: Clone/create/fork repos; manage remotes, releases.

skills.name: debugging-hermes-tui-commands
skills.description: Debug Hermes TUI slash commands: Python, gateway, Ink UI.

skills.name: dependency-upgrades
skills.description: Upgrade dependencies in a pnpm monorepo — surgical targeted upgrades vs blanket major bumps.

skills.name: hermes-agent-skill-authoring
skills.description: Author in-repo SKILL.md: frontmatter, validator, structure.

skills.name: multi-repo-review
skills.description: Review multiple repositories in parallel for code quality, security, configuration issues.

skills.name: nix-docker-builds
skills.description: Build Docker images with Nix: pure Nix vs hybrid builder patterns.

skills.name: node-inspect-debugger
skills.description: Debug Node.js via --inspect + Chrome DevTools Protocol CLI.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Plan mode: write an actionable markdown plan to .hermes/plans/, no execution.

skills.name: python-debugpy
skills.description: Debug Python: pdb REPL + debugpy remote (DAP).

skills.name: requesting-code-review
skills.description: Pre-commit review: security scan, quality gates, auto-fix.

skills.name: sonarqube-refactoring
skills.description: Fix SonarQube quality gate issues: cognitive complexity, unnecessary assertions.

skills.name: spike
skills.description: Throwaway experiments to validate an idea before build.

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
skills.description: Execute plans via delegate_task subagents (2-stage review).

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: 4-phase root cause debugging: understand bugs before fixing.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: TDD: enforce RED-GREEN-REFACTOR, tests before code.

skills.name: vitest-configuration
skills.description: Troubleshoot and fix Vitest configuration issues.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Write implementation plans: bite-sized tasks, paths, code.

skills.name: nestjs-build-fixing
skills.description: Fix NestJS + TypeScript build errors and migrate auth/routes from legacy Fastify to NestJS.

skills.name: nestjs-logging
skills.description: Add consistent, debug-friendly logging to NestJS modules.

skills.name: nestjs-module-migration
skills.description: Migrate a legacy backend module into the NestJS monorepo.

skills.name: security-best-practices
skills.description: Language/framework security best-practice reviews (Python, JS/TS, Go).

skills.name: security-threat-model
skills.description: Repository-grounded threat modeling that enumerates trust boundaries, assets, attack paths.

skills.name: yuanbao
skills.description: Yuanbao (元宝) groups: @mention users, query info/members.
